MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Peter J. Keith, Deputy City Attorney, 415-554-3908, for defendant and moving party CCSF
Perry A. Irvine, Esq., 650-328-3001, for plaintiff and opposing party Community Dental Care,

RULING:
A R G U E D; the Court adopted its Tentative Ruling: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED. The Court takes the issue of WITH OR WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND under submission. Counsel to prepare proposed orders. (301/JLW/AC) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
